description:
Read-only viewer for your Uptime Kuma monitors. Private, no ads, no tracking.
OpenKuma is a private, read-only Android client for Uptime Kuma, the self-hosted monitoring tool. Check the health of your services from your phone, without ever changing anything on your instance.

OpenKuma is strictly read-only. It is 100% free and open source, sends no data to anyone, and has no ads, no tracking and no Google services.

Features:

* Connect to your Uptime Kuma servers over the Socket.IO API
* Dashboard with live counts (up, down, pending), active incidents and expiring certificates
* Monitor list with instant search, sorting and local favorites
* Monitor detail: status, 24h uptime, response times, general info, TLS certificate and recent checks
* Certificates screen sorted by soonest expiry, with a visual warning
* Events log of status changes
* Offline cache so the last known state is always available
* Light and dark themes, Material You on Android 12+, English and French

Privacy first: only your session token is kept on the device, encrypted with the Android Keystore. Your password is never written to disk.

OpenKuma is an unofficial client and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Uptime Kuma.
